question: Find colleges or research institutes.
extra_names: ['birla balika vidyapeeth', 'birla institute of technology and science - bits', 'birla shishu vihar', 'ceeri school']
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM campus_places WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != 'nan' AND (amenity ILIKE '%college%' OR amenity ILIKE '%research_institute%') ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 5;
pred_sql: SELECT name, amenity, CASE WHEN amenity IN ('college', 'university') THEN 'yes' ELSE '' END AS college, CASE WHEN amenity IN ('research_institute', 'school') THEN 'yes' ELSE '' END AS research_institute FROM campus_places WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != 'nan' AND (amenity ILIKE '%college%' OR amenity ILIKE '%university%') OR (amenity ILIKE '%research_institute%' OR amenity ILIKE '%school%') GROUP BY name, amenity, college, research_institute ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 5;
raw_pred_sql:
SELECT name,
        amenity,
        CASE
            WHEN amenity IN ('college', 'university') THEN 'yes'
            ELSE ''
        END AS college,
        CASE
            WHEN amenity IN ('research_institute', 'school') THEN 'yes'
            ELSE ''
        END AS research_institute
FROM    campus_places
WHERE   name IS NOT NULL AND name != 'nan'
AND     (amenity ILIKE '%college%' OR amenity ILIKE '%university%')
OR      (amenity ILIKE '%research_institute%' OR amenity ILIKE '%school%')
GROUP BY name, amenity, college, research_institute
ORDER BY name ASC
